name: Potato Latkes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and finely grate the potatoes. Place them in cold water to prevent greasiness, then drain thoroughly by pressing with hands over a colander.
2. Beat the eggs with salt. Mix into the grated potatoes.
3. Heat oil in a frying pan. Drop spoonfuls (up to ¼ cup) of the mixture into the hot oil.
4. Flatten slightly and lower heat so they cook evenly. Brown on one side, then flip and brown the other.
5. Remove from oil and serve very hot.
Yield: 6 servings
